text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--SLB (NYSE: SLB) announced today that its End-to-end Emissions Solutions business (SEES) has been selected by integrated energy company Eni (NYSE: E) to deliver comprehensive fugitive methane emissions measurement and reporting plans for Eni's global operating facilities. title: Plexus jumps as partner SLB wins North Sea plug and abandon contract
text: Plexus Holdings PLC (AIM:POS) shares rose 15% to 25.4p after the oil and gas engineering services business highlighted a "milestone" contract win by partner Schlumberger (SLB) using its wellhead engineering technology.  The AIM-quoted company, with which SLB has an exclusive license, said it expects equipment rental revenues in the region of £100,000 after SLB won a contract with a North Sea company to use the Exact adjustable wellhead and Centric mudline suspension systems for a plug and abandonment (P&A) project.

title: SLB Launches Carbon Storage Screening and Ranking Solution
